narrative:
Hanover Township has 5,924 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.4 percentage points.
